zh.Saintbury, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾沙特波利
zh.Aston, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾阿斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Fullwood於1541年出生在英國瓦維其可爾阿斯頓時，她的父親Robert Fullwood23歲，母親Maria Hunt24歲。她於1566年5月30日與Richard Long Gunne III在英國瓦維其可爾阿斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Saintbury, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾沙特波利
zh-hans.Aston, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾阿斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Fullwood于1541年出生在英国瓦維其可爾阿斯頓时，她的父亲Robert Fullwood23岁，母亲Maria Hunt24岁。她于1566年5月30日与Richard Long Gunne III在英国瓦維其可爾阿斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Fullwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): habitational name from a lost place called Fulwood near Clay Hall in Tanworth in Arden, Warwickshire or from one or more of the other places so called, such as Fulwood in Ecclesall (Yorkshire), Fulwood (Lancashire), Fulwood in Sutton in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), and Fullwood Farm in Hulland (Derbyshire). From Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + wudu ‘wood’.

variants.name: Fullard
meanings: In some cases possibly an altered form of German Vollert, Fullert, or Füllert: from the personal name Volhard, Vollhardt (from Old High German Volkhart, a compound of volc ‘tribe, people’ + hart ‘bold’).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Fullwood was born in 1541, in Aston, Warwickshire, England, her father, Robert Fullwood, was 23 and her mother, Maria Hunt, was 24. She married Richard Long Gunne III on 30 May 1566, in Aston, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Fullwood est née en 1541, à Aston, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Fullwood, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Maria Hunt, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Long Gunne III le 30 mai 1566, à Aston, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Fullwood 1541 in Aston, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Fullwood 23 und ihre Mutter Maria Hunt 24. Sie hat am 30. Mai 1566 in Aston, Warwickshire, England Richard Long Gunne III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Fullwood è nata il nel 1541 nel Aston, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Robert Fullwood, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Maria Hunt, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Richard Long Gunne III il 30 maggio 1566, nel Aston, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Ann Fullwoodが1541年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストンで生まれた時，父Robert Fullwoodは23歳，母Maria Huntは24歳であった。1566年5月30日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストンでRichard Long Gunne IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Fullwood(이)가 1541년 영국 워윅실르 애스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Fullwood(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Hunt(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1566년 5월 30일 영국 워윅실르 애스턴에서 Richard Long Gunne III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Fullwood nasceu em 1541, em Aston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Fullwood, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Maria Hunt, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Long Gunne III em 30 de maio de 1566, em Aston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Fullwood родилась в 1541 г. в местности астон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Fullwood было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Hunt, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Long Gunne III 30 мая 1566 г. в местности астон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Fullwood nació en 1541, en Aston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Fullwood, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Maria Hunt, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Richard Long Gunne III el 30 de mayo de 1566, en Aston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas.
